---
title: "Report Title"
subtitle: "Subtitle or Study Name"
author: "Conal Monaghan"
date: today
date-format: "DD MMMM YYYY"

format:
  html:
    theme:
      - flatly
      - precision_custom.scss
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    toc-title: "Contents"
    toc-expand: true
    number-sections: false
    smooth-scroll: true
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    highlight-style: github
    embed-resources: true
    fig-width: 8
    fig-height: 5
    fig-align: center
    fig-cap-location: bottom
    tbl-cap-location: top
    citations-hover: true
    footnotes-hover: true

execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
  cache: false

bibliography: references.bib
csl: apa.csl

brand: _brand.yml
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

# =============================================================================
# USER INPUTS
# =============================================================================

# Add project-specific inputs here

# =============================================================================
# END USER INPUTS
# =============================================================================

packages <- c(
  "here",
  "readr",
  "dplyr",
  "tidyr",
  "ggplot2",
  "patchwork",
  "gt",
  "gtsummary",
  "knitr",
  "sessioninfo"
)

install_and_load <- function(pkgs) {
  missing <- pkgs[!pkgs %in% installed.packages()[, "Package"]]
  if (length(missing) > 0) install.packages(missing)
  invisible(lapply(pkgs, library, character.only = TRUE))
}

install_and_load(packages)
```

## Overview

*Brief description of this report's purpose and scope.*

## Method

### Participants

### Measures

### Analysis

## Results

## Discussion

## References

::: {#refs}
:::

```{r}
#| label: session-info
#| echo: false

sessioninfo::session_info()
```

```{r}
#| label: pkg-bibliography
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

knitr::write_bib(x = packages, file = here::here("references.bib"))
```
